title: Connect Running Container to Network
story: The container `late-joiner` is already running but needs to join `mission-net` without restarting. Connect it dynamically.
objectives: Connect running container `late-joiner` to network `mission-net` without stopping it
hints: `docker network connect <network> <container>` attaches a running container

initialState.summary: - Container `late-joiner` (alpine, running, `sleep 3600`) on default bridge - Network `mission-net` exists
